use_cases: Interactive hero section with fluid dynamics that responds to user hover and movement
Creative background effect for landing pages and product showcases
Decorative interactive element for design system demonstrations
Ambient visual component for creative SaaS and portfolio sites
Touch-responsive fluid visualization for mobile-friendly interfaces
ai_summary: A canvas-based fluid simulation component that renders interactive, dynamic fluid effects using computational fluid dynamics. The simulation responds to mouse hover and movement, creating organic flowing patterns with configurable viscosity. Features a 128x128 grid system for velocity and density calculations, producing smooth, responsive fluid animations suitable as an engaging visual element for hero sections or decorative backgrounds.
